claims.text: We claim: 1. An aerosol formulation comprising: (a) a therapeutically effective amount of a medicament; and (b) a propellant substantially free of chlorofluorocarbons, said propellant comprising 1,1,1...
4. A method for delivering a drug to the lung of a mammal, comprising administering to said mammal an aerosol formulation according to claim 1 by inhalation.

indications.text:
104 PROVENTIL HFA Inhalation Aerosol is indicated in adults and children 4 years of age and
105 older for the treatment or prevention of bronchospasm with reversible obstructive airway disease
106 and for the prevention of exercise-induced bronchospasm.
